reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion. Amplia arbolada con buenos juegos para los chicos y variedad para comer. El mejor lugar para parar camino a MDQ

(Translated by Google)
A very good station. Large, wooded area with good playground equipment for children and a variety of food options. The best place to stop on the way to Mar del Plata.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMWN1YmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, el parque que lo rodea ina maravilla.
El café y la atención muy buenos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location, the surrounding park is wonderful.
The coffee and service were excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRamRfWUpREAE

reviews.comment:
